travel_events.name: Asteroids
travel_events.description: Rocky debris everywhere, maybe from a recent collision?
travel_events.effect: Roll to avoid damage or use Probe Launcher. On failure, take 1D6 Hull damage.

travel_events.name: Navigation Trouble
travel_events.description: Is this place even on the star maps?
travel_events.effect: Lose 1 story point. If ship is damaged, roll 1D6. On 1-2, a random crew member suffers an injury.

travel_events.name: Raided
travel_events.description: Your vessel catches the eye of some pirates.
travel_events.effect: Roll 2D6 + highest Savvy. On 7+, intimidate pirates. Otherwise, engage in battle.

travel_events.name: Deep Space Wreckage
travel_events.description: You find an old wreck drifting through empty space.
travel_events.effect: Gain two damaged items of random type and quality.

travel_events.name: Drive Trouble
travel_events.description: It's not supposed to make that sound.
travel_events.effect: Roll 3 times, needing 6+ on 2D6 + highest Savvy. Each failure grounds ship for 1 turn.

travel_events.name: Down-time
travel_events.description: It's a long time to just sit here.
travel_events.effect: A random crew member gains 1 XP. Attempt to repair one random damaged item.

travel_events.name: Distress Call
travel_events.effect: Roll 1D6. 1: Take 1D6+1 Hull damage. 2: Find wreckage. 3-4: Rescue new crew member. 5-6: Save ship, gain reward or take damage.

travel_events.name: Patrol Ship
travel_events.description: A Unity patrol vessel hails you.
travel_events.effect: Roll 2D6-3 for each of two random items. On success, item is confiscated. Next world cannot be Invaded.

travel_events.name: Cosmic Phenomenon
travel_events.description: A crew member sees a strange manifestation in space.
travel_events.effect: Random crew member gains 1 Luck. If you have a Precursor, gain 1 story point.

travel_events.name: Escape Pod
travel_events.description: You find an escape pod drifting through space.
travel_events.effect: Roll 1D6. 1: Gain Rival. 2-3: Gain credits and item. 4: Gain Quest Rumor and story point. 5-6: Gain new crew member.

travel_events.name: Accident
travel_events.description: A crew member gets hurt during routine maintenance.
travel_events.effect: Random crew member is Injured (rest 1 campaign turn to recover). One item they carry is DAMAGED.

travel_events.name: Travel-time
travel_events.description: Long system approach under standard drives.
travel_events.effect: Long approach. Injured crew may rest for 1 campaign turn.

travel_events.name: Uneventful Trip
travel_events.description: Time for cards and gun cleaning.

travel_events.name: Time to Read
travel_events.effect: Roll 1D6. 1-2: 1 random crew +3 XP. 3-4: 1 random +2 XP, another +1. 5-6: 3 random each +1 XP.

travel_events.name: Locked in the Library
travel_events.description: Someone found a data-cache worth studying.
travel_events.effect: Generate 3 worlds (roll traits, problems, licensing). Choose one as destination. All 3 remain for later visits.

battle_events._metadata: Optional Battle Events table — Core Rules pp.116-117. Roll at end of Round 2 and Round 4. VERIFIED Mar 22, 2026.
battle_events.timing: End of Round 2, then end of Round 4. Max 2 events per battle.

entries.name: Renewed efforts
entries.effect: After all enemy actions, select random enemy for second Move + Combat Action for rest of battle

entries.name: Enemy reinforcements
entries.effect: 2 additional enemies arrive at center of opposing edge. 1 armed as Specialist

entries.name: Change of plans
entries.effect: Enemy switches to Cautious AI (if already Cautious: Tactical). No-ranged enemies unaffected

entries.name: Lost heart
entries.effect: Enemy leaves the field at end of next round

entries.name: Seized the moment
entries.effect: Select crew member who acts in both Quick and Slow phases next round

entries.name: Critters!
entries.effect: Place 1D3 Vent Crawlers (p.102) at table center, move each 1D6" random direction. Attack nearest figure regardless of side

entries.name: Ammo fault
entries.effect: Random crew member: if fired last round, weapon unusable rest of battle. If not, random weapon fires once only

entries.name: Visibility change
entries.effect: If reduced: +1D6" range. If unlimited: reduce to 1D6+6"

entries.name: Tougher than expected
entries.effect: Random enemy gets +1 Toughness (max 6) and remove all Stun markers

entries.name: Snap shot
entries.effect: Select crew member for immediate fire. Pistol: auto-hit. Otherwise: roll normally

entries.name: Cunning plan
entries.effect: Next round: no Initiative roll. Each crew acts in Quick or Slow as you prefer

entries.name: Possible reinforcements
entries.effect: 3 markers on opposing edge. Each round: random marker, 1D6 on 5-6 spawns basic enemy. Crew within 3" removes marker

entries.name: Clock is running out
entries.effect: End of next+ rounds: 1D6, on 6 game ends immediately. No objectives, no Hold unless enemies cleared

entries.name: Environmental hazard
entries.effect: Random terrain feature: figures in/on/within 1" roll 1D6+Savvy 5+ (enemies 1D6 4+) or take Damage+1 ignoring armor

entries.name: A desperate plan
entries.effect: Random crew can't act next round. Select another who acts in both Quick and Slow phases

entries.name: A moment of hesitation
entries.effect: Next round: only 1 figure in Quick (must be Feral if present). All others in Slow

entries.name: Fumbled grenade
entries.effect: Random enemy runs 6" random direction, Stunned. All within 4" run 4" away. Grenade harmless. No effect if enemy wouldn't use grenades

entries.name: Back up
entries.effect: If spare crew available, one arrives at center of your edge

entries.name: Enemy VIP
entries.effect: Unique Individual joins enemy at center of their edge

entries.name: Fog cloud
entries.effect: Dense fog at table center, 6" radius, blocks visibility past 2" for rest of battle

entries.name: Lost!
entries.effect: Random crew member removed from battle (rejoins safely after). Ignore if outnumbered

entries.name: I found something!
entries.effect: Random crew, place marker 1D6" away. Contact + non-Combat Action = Loot roll (p.131)

entries.name: Looks valuable
entries.effect: Random crew, place marker 1D6" away. Contact + non-Combat Action = 1D3 credits

entries.name: You want me to check that out?
entries.effect: Random crew may leave battle. After battle: roll on Loot Table. If declined, chance lost
